Which Brown Eyed Girls move is Psy borrow for his "Gentleman" music video?

Brown Eyed Girls' iconic "Abracadabra" hip-swinging move from its 2009 hit single was the inspiration for Psy's "Gentleman" music video. Psy was even able to convince Brown Eyed Girls member Gain to reprise the move in his music video.
